external_stage10a_number_swap.interpretation: Both configs collapse all stage10a number-swap examples to NOT_ENTITLED. Stage28-I does not worsen number-swap. Probe is degenerate for comparing location-boundary configs; serves as a no-false-SUPPORT regression check only.

external_stage15_slot_sensitivity.interpretation: Total false SUPPORT increases (+22) driven almost entirely by temporal axis (+24). Location axis improves (-2). Predicate and role unchanged. Stage28-I is not a broad OOD or generalization solution.

axis_interpretation.location: Improves from 6 to 4. Location-boundary cap provides weak but directionally correct generalization to Stage15 location-swap axis.
axis_interpretation.predicate: Unchanged. Cap has no predicate effect as expected.
axis_interpretation.temporal: Worsens from 246 to 270 (+24). The total false SUPPORT degradation is driven almost entirely by temporal mismatch.

decision.stage30_immediate_action: Analyze temporal false-SUPPORT records in Stage15; compare temporal_mismatch vs temporal_erased/surface/sufficiency controls before adding any broad temporal router.
decision.rationale: Stage28-I improves controlled no-time dev (+0.033 macro-F1) and weakly reduces location-frame false SUPPORT on Stage15 (-2). It does not provide broad OOD generalization. Temporal false SUPPORT rises from 246 to 270. Freeze Stage28-I as a narrowly scoped location-boundary improvement; address temporal false SUPPORT in Stage30.

remaining_risks: Temporal generalisation gap: 270 temporal false SUPPORTs on Stage15 remain. No temporal fix in Stage28-I; Stage30 must address this independently.
Number-swap degenerate: stage10a probe is non-informative until a separate stage targets number-swap coverage.
External probe scope: only Stage15 and Stage10a evaluated; results should not be extrapolated to unseen intervention distributions.
n=3 runs: variance not reported; individual-run prediction JSONs should be consulted for per-seed stability.
time_swap not in training: temporal mismatch generalization cannot be expected without explicit temporal supervision in the training regime.

next_recommended_stage.first_action: Analyze Stage15 temporal false-SUPPORT records; compare temporal_mismatch vs temporal_erased/surface/sufficiency probe sub-types to identify the dominant temporal failure mechanism before designing any intervention.
next_recommended_stage.do_not_do_immediately: Do not add a broad temporal router without first diagnosing which temporal sub-type drives the 246-270 false-SUPPORT range. Premature routing risks Stage23-style gradient coupling into the shared frame representation.
next_recommended_stage.number_swap_note: Address number-swap collapse in a separate stage after Stage30 temporal analysis is complete.
